CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS Movies (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(120), genre VARCHAR(30), release_year INT, director VARCHAR(80), country VARCHAR(40), language VARCHAR(30), duration_min INT, budget_million_usd DECIMAL(10,1), box_office_million_usd DECIMAL(10,1), imdb_rating DECIMAL(3,1), rotten_tomatoes_pct INT, oscar_nominations INT, oscars_won INT, streaming_platform VARCHAR(40))
